name: Cream Cheese Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 large Can sliced peaches, drained (20-28oz), juice reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine and beat the first seven ingredients for 2 minutes.
3. Pour into a greased 10-inch pie pan.
4. Place sliced peaches on top of the batter.
5. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and peach juice. Beat for 2 minutes.
6. Smooth with a spoon within 1/2 inch of the edge of the pie pan.
7. Mix sugar and spices, sprinkle on top of the pie.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
